app-top: padding: 50px 16px 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
me-av: width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(98,100,167,0.4); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; position: relative;
team-row: height: 52px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 0 16px;
team-av: width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 7px; background: rgba(98,100,167,0.4); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700;
chev: color: var(--text-secondary); transform: rotate(90deg); display: flex;
ch-row: height: 42px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 0 16px 0 44px; position: relative;
msg-av: width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(98,100,167,0.4); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; position: relative; flex-shrink: 0;
react: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 500px; background: var(--surface-2); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-secondary);
tab-bar: height: 60px; background: var(--surface-1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-around; padding: 6px 4px 14px; border-top: 1px solid var(--divider);
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 3px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; position: relative;
